core_mechanism: non-perturbative functional renormalization-group flow: progressively integrating out fluctuation modes scale by scale via an exact flow equation for a scale-dependent coarse-grained effective action, closed by a systematic truncation (derivative expansion) rather than a perturbative series
brief_reason: The abstract is built entirely around the 'non-perturbative renormalization group formalism' for stochastic dynamics, solved within the 'derivative expansion approximation at order two', i.e. a scale-by-scale coarse-graining flow of an effective action closed by truncation instead of perturbation theory.
